---
title: "Geographical Thought"
subtitle: "Evolution of geographic ideas from ancient civilizations to contemporary paradigms."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include geographical-thought/00-syllabus.md >}}




Welcome to the **Geographical Thought** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course traces the intellectual history of geography as a discipline — from the earliest map-makers and travelers to modern critical and quantitative paradigms.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Contributions of Greek, Roman, Arab, Chinese and Indian Scholars.**
* **Contributions of Geographers (Bernhardus Varenius, Immanuel Kant, Alexander von Humboldt, Carl Ritter, Scheafer & Hartshorne).**
* **Impact of Darwinian Theory on Geographical Thought.**
* **Contemporary trends in Indian Geography: Cartography, Thematic and Methodological contributions.**
* **Major Geographic Traditions (Earth Science, man-environment relationship, area studies and spatial analysis).**
* **Dualisms in Geographic Studies (physical vs. human, regional vs. systematic, qualitative vs. quantitative, ideographic vs. nomothetic).**
* **Paradigm Shift, Perspectives in Geography (Positivism, Behaviouralism, Humanism, Structuralism, Feminism and Postmodernism).**

---

{{< include geographical-thought/01-geographic-knowledge-during-the-ancient-and-medieval-period.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/02-foundations-of-modern-geography-contributions-of.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/03-german-schools.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/04-french-schools.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/05-british-schools.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/06-american-schools.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/41-geographers-by-school.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/07-conceptual-and-methodological-developments-during-the-20th-century.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/08-changing-paradigms-in-geography.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/09-man-and-environment-determinism-and-possibilism.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/10-area-differentiation-and-spatial-organization.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/11-quantitative-revolution-and-locational-analysis.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/12-impact-of.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/13-positivism.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/14-humanism.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/15-radicalism.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/16-behavioralism.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/17-ancient-classical-geography.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/18-areal-differentiation.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/19-behavioural-humanistic-geography.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/20-central-place-theories-of-christaller-and-losch.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/21-course-content.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/22-cultural-regions-of-the-world.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/23-dichotomy-and-dualism.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/24-environmentalism.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/25-heart-land-and-rimland-theories.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/26-human-development-index.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/27-languages-religions-and-secularisation.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/28-laws-of-international-boundaries-and-frontiers.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/29-malthusian-marxian-and-demographic-transition-models.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/30-medieval-renaissance-geography.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/31-modern-geographical-thought.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/32-perroux-and-boudeville.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/33-postmodern-geography.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/34-radical-behavioural-human-and-welfare-approaches.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/35-radical-critical-geography.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/36-regional-synthesis.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/37-rostows-model-of-stages-of-growth.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/38-system-analysis-in-human-geography.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/39-von-thunens-model-of-agricultural-location.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/40-webers-model-of-industrial-location.md >}}
